---
title: "Single-cell analysis tutorials"
---

This site contains hands-on single-cell analysis tutorials in R using SEA-AD
data.

## Tutorials

- [Tutorial 00: Setup](tutorials/00-setup/index.qmd)
- [Tutorial 01: Read an H5AD file](tutorials/01-read-h5ad/index.qmd)
- [Tutorial 02: Preprocessing](tutorials/02-preprocessing/index.qmd)
- [Tutorial 03a: Building pseudobulk profiles](tutorials/03a-pseudobulk/index.qmd)
- [Tutorial 03b: Ordering cells along a trajectory](tutorials/03b-trajectory/index.qmd)
- [Tutorial 04: Pseudobulk differential expression](tutorials/04-pseudobulk-de/index.qmd)
